title: Fire and Flames
description: A Blacksmith's Dream; Process resources in a Crucible and craft Custom Tools and Armour
body:
![Fire and Flames text banner](https://i.imgur.com/4FuamGF.png)

![Mod Banner showing Crucible structure with molten gold and Raw Iron Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/Ah1e4XV.png)

**Fire and Flames** is a medieval fantasy blacksmithing mod that lets you forge custom tools and armor using molten metals processed in powerful multiblock structures.

## The Crucible

The heart of Fire and Flames is the **Crucible** - a multiblock smelting structure that transforms raw ores into molten metals and allows you to create powerful alloys.

**Flexible Power Sources**  
Power your Crucible with solid fuels or fluid heat sources for maximum efficiency.  
![Screen showing Coal used in the Crucible Burner](https://i.imgur.com/5nljXfm.png) ![Image showing Fuel Tank filled with Lava placed within the Crucible structure](https://i.imgur.com/mqqqJdw.png)

**Enhanced Ore Processing**  
Get more yield from your ores compared to standard furnace smelting!  
![Crucible Screen containing Molten Gold and Copper as well as Raw Iron Block being smelted](https://i.imgur.com/949LaId.png)

**Casting System**  
Pour your molten metals into **Casting Tables** and **Casting Basins** to create ingots, blocks, and tool components.  
![Molten Iron being poured into the Casting Basin and Copper Ingot already formed in the Casting Table](https://i.imgur.com/y2mRQ8Z.png)

## Customization & Configuration

Fire and Flames is built with **data packs** and **configs** in mind, making it easy to customize recipes, materials, and gameplay to fit your modpack or server needs.

## Documentation

Visit our [Wiki](https://github.com/Quarris/FireAndFlames/wiki) for detailed guides on gameplay mechanics and development resources. _(Wiki currently under active development)_

## Development
Fire and Flames is under continuous development with features and changes based on community feedback to be implemented.

***

_Fire and Flames is an original implementation inspired by Tinkers' Construct, built from the ground up with long-term support and unique features planned for the future._
